events.appearance_notes: Observed event; On the right side of a consultation desk, a woman in a black striped top is talking to a man in a gray jacket. On the left, a man in a black coat and a man in a blue coat walk to the information desk. Four people talking.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 5.5s, on the right side of a consultation desk, a woman in a black striped top is talking to a man in a gray jacket. On the left, a man in a black coat and a man in a blue coat walk to the information desk. Four people talking.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man in black took out his mobile phone and a small card and gave it to the man in gray shirt. The woman in black striped shirt handed over a document.
events.event_text: From 5.5s to 8.3s, the man in black took out his mobile phone and a small card and gave it to the man in gray shirt. The woman in black striped shirt handed over a document.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; A man in black enters the upper right corner of the screen and walks to the left side of the screen. Two old men wearing white hats and dark blue tops on the left walk to the top of the screen and leave.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Two clerks walked by on the left side of the screen, and the four people in the center of the screen were talking about something.
